inputs.text: A cinematic extreme-angle back view of an anthropomorphic rabbit character sitting casually on the very edge of a futuristic cityscape skyscraper rooftop during a rainy day. The character, a furry bipedal rabbit, wears a rugged, khaki-green bomber jacket and large professional DJ headphones on its head (covering the ears), with its long rabbit ears poking through the top structure of the headphones. A small, well-worn, vintage-style backpack with patches is on its back. The rabbit is centered on the left third of the image (Rule of Thirds), occupying about 1/3 of the frame, gazing out over the sprawling, cyberpunk-style futuristic city with neon lights reflecting off wet surfaces and through the rain. The view is from a high rooftop, looking slightly down and across. Water droplets on the lens, dark atmosphere, photorealistic, 8k, highly detailed, film grain, dramatic lighting.
text, watermark, logo, blurry, low quality
